meaning: n.底特律,美国密歇根(Michigan)州东南部的大城市,位于底特律河流上
examples: The Red Sox lost the pennant to Detroit by a single game.
Bilal was held without bail after a court appearance in Detroit.
What he is better remembered for is the introduction of the moving assembly-line in Detroit in 1913.
GM, like the rest of Detroit, poured its development money into trucks and SUVs.
Despite its smallish population (120, 000), Evansville tops bigger metropolises like Miami, Chicago, Detroit and Washington, D.
